title: Double Sided Tape Heavy Duty 3 m, Strong Double Sided Sticky Tape, Double Sided Carpet Tape Clear Tape Nano Tape, Traceless Transparent Double Sided Adhesive Tape for Office, Home, Kitchen, Party, Car
features: 💪【DOUBLE SIDED TAPE HEAVY DUTY】 Made of high-quality nano gel, this self adhesive tape can hold things on a smooth surface. The strong grip fits in many heavy duty mounting tasks and can stand the test of time. No nails, no drilling, leaving no marks on walls, and that makes the nano tape a hit in many households.

💪【REMOVABLE AND WASHABLE】The two sided sticky tape can be removed without leaving any residue on the surface. It would be easier to peel the strip off with a scraper. Lift one corner up and move to the rest slowly. It might snap if you rip it off abruptly. You can wash and air-dry or blow- dry the tape but do not wipe it with rag or tissue.

💪【VERSATILE AND PRACTICAL】Stick keys, utensils, secure extension lead, fix carpets, hang pictures, decorate the house for holidays. You are going to discover so many uses of this clear adhesive strip and in countless applications you will find it so efficient and almost effortless to work with. However, please don’t stick fragile items or anything with high value on the tape.

💪【WIDE APPLICATIONS】This double sided adhesive pad is a handy tool for living room, kitchen, bathroom, office and cars. It works very well with tile, glass, wood, metal, plastic, leather, etc. It DOES NOT WORK on dusty, wet, greasy surface. For painted wall and thin wall paper, please test a small strip on an imperceptible area first.

💪【HOW TO USE】 Stand the tape upright when using as it’s sticky on both sides. 1. Make sure the contact surface is clean and dry 2. Cut it to right size you need 3. Stick the tape on the item 4. Give the tape a good press before peeling the protective film off 5. A little twist will help you remove the items from the tape.
description: Product Description YOGINGO 3M/10FT Nano Double Sided Tape Heavy Duty Why choose our non-marking double-sided tape ? This is a revolutionary new type of tape that does not use adhesives, but it is enough strength on any smooth surface. The secret is advanced nano-grip technology. It's like millions of microscopic suction cups that lock on and hold tight to any surface! Pull to release the suction and it comes right off. YOGINGO tape can lock anything in place instantly without screws or anchors. It is very suitable for decorating festivals or celebrations. Use it to prevent furniture from sliding and become a mobile phone holder while driving. And there will never be any residue, because there is no glue. We have specially prepared 1 rolls of tape for you, and is 3m/10ft in length. The color is transparent are available for attaching more items such as photos, balloons, fixed carpets, furniture, posters, bathroom and kitchen accessories etc. Excellent quality and reliable performance for your double-sided tape. Strong Ductility Nano acrylic double-sided tape has strong adhesion, can easily fix objects, and objects are not easy to fall off. If you want to stick heavy items, increase the amount of double-sided tape. Easy to Remove The double-sided tape can be easily torn off as a whole without causing damage to the wall. And there will never be any residue, because there is no glue. REUSABLE Tape can be reused multiple times, and it should work just as effectively the seventh time as it did the first. Just rinse it off in the sink and let it dry before applying it to a new surface. When carrying out wall displays, we often realise that using a drill and nails is not the best attention. It is not possible to undo or adjust the holes drilled in the wall if they need to be repositioned. Drilling holes may receive complaints from neighbours or even harm yourself. The new technology double-sided nano tape comes in handy as the preferred alternative. Decoration can be an experience that is peaceful, safe, and allows new ideas. Fixed Carpet Is Safer Quantity: 1 rolls Length: 3 meters/10ft Width: 2cm Material: Nano gel Color: transparent Simple To Use Step 1: Cut the tape to a desired length. Step 2: Give the tape a good press for at least 5 seconds, this will help the adhesive last longer on the surface. Step 3: Peel off the outer film of the nano double-sided tape. Step 4: Stick some items on. Twist the item little bit if struggled to take it down. A little tip：Clean the surface and the items you want to stick on the surface. A dry and clean environment will bring out the best performance of the Nano tape. Please Notice Please don't it on the rough surface, powder wall, greasy and wet surface. We don't recommend using it on painted wall or poorly attached wall paper as there is a chance it can take the outer layer off when removed. Please always test on a small area first. Please don't stick anything valuable item using the tape. If you want to stick heavy items, increase the amount of double-sided tape. Please keep out of reaching children. Store in a cool dry place away from direct sunlight.
